summary: A web-based shooter game similar to Fortnite
architectural_notes: Shooter game genre with battle royale mechanics
Mobile and tablet responsive design required

existing_features.title: Create a 3D game environment using Three.js with React Three Fiber for rendering the game world
Implement first-person or third-person camera controls allowing players to look around and move through the 3D environment
Create a player character model with basic shooting mechanics including weapon aiming and firing
Create a spawn system that places players into the game world at designated spawn points
Design a vibrant, futuristic visual theme with high-contrast colors, bold typography, and dynamic layouts that evoke competitive gaming aesthetics
Implement responsive viewport configuration to ensure the game canvas scales properly on phone and iPad screen sizes
Add touch controls overlay for mobile devices with virtual joystick for movement and tap-to-shoot functionality to replace WASD keyboard and mouse controls
Optimize PlayerController component to detect device type and switch between pointer lock controls for desktop and touch controls for mobile/tablet
Update GameHUD component to be responsive and scale UI elements appropriately for smaller mobile screens while maintaining readability
Add viewport meta tag configuration to HomePage and GamePage to prevent unwanted zooming and ensure proper mobile rendering

new_feature_requests.summary: Create web-based shooter game with Fortnite-style gameplay
Implement game state management in the backend to track player positions, health, and match status
Add mobile and tablet (phone/iPad) support for responsive gameplay
